sources.title: Ecolab Delivers Continued Double-Digit EPS Growth - Q1 2025
Ecolab Announces Record Fourth Quarter and Strong 2026 Outlook
3D TRASAR Technology - Advanced Water Management System

items.title: Global Water is large enough that fleet standardization matters
items.summary: Ecolab's Global Water segment scale implies the operating model cannot rely only on local field knowledge; enterprise visibility and reusable playbooks are required.
items.implication: Prioritize enterprise dashboards, template-based treatment programs, and repeatable remote response workflows.

kpis: Sites with verified enterprise water baseline

items.title: Digital is a growth engine, not a reporting add-on
items.summary: Ecolab publicly reports double-digit digital growth, which suggests software subscriptions, connected hardware, and monitoring should be modeled as core monetization loops.
items.implication: Treat remote monitoring, benchmarking, and workflow subscriptions as primary business outcomes, not support features.

items.title: Operational reliability is the wedge for digital adoption
items.summary: 3D TRASAR is positioned around detecting upsets early, controlling chemistry, and keeping systems running within target conditions.
items.implication: Model alarming, chemistry recommendation, and operator response as central journeys rather than back-office analytics.

items.title: Water savings need asset-level signal quality
items.summary: Water Track IQ is explicitly positioned around enterprise, site, and asset-level visibility plus leak and flow analysis.
items.implication: Include flow intelligence, leak detection, and water-balance views as first-class product bricks instead of burying them under generic analytics.

kpis: Cooling and boiler water use per production unit

items.title: Wastewater and reuse are expansion paths, not side modules
items.summary: Ecolab positions effluent optimization around compliance risk reduction, lower surcharges, and treated-water reuse.
items.implication: Model wastewater control, compliance evidence, and reuse readiness as durable capabilities with distinct value and ownership.

items.title: Ecolab sells measurable eROI, not only chemistry
items.summary: Public impact materials emphasize customer value and eROI, which means savings verification and project proof are central to renewals and expansion.
items.implication: Include explicit value-project tracking, verified savings baselines, and enterprise review workflows in the model.

items.title: Hybrid human plus digital delivery is part of the product
items.summary: Ecolab's operating model combines local experts, a global support network, and always-on monitoring rather than a standalone SaaS workflow.
items.implication: Represent remote case work, field work management, and recommendation acceptance as core workflows, not external implementation noise.

items.title: Water leaders need enterprise proof, plant leaders need alarm trust
items.summary: The buying center spans enterprise and site roles with different decision clocks and success criteria.
items.implication: Separate enterprise value-control workflows from site-operating workflows in customers, KPIs, and product definitions.

kpis: Sites with verified enterprise water baseline
